text: Le eƒe lɛta si wotso afia nɛ me la, ŋutsu sia ƒe afɔɖeɖea tsi tre ɖe Ekiti Ðeviwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe se si wowɔ le ƒe 2012 ƒe Se 32 ƒe akpa 2 lia me ŋu.
ref: In his sentenced letter, the action of this man is against the Ekiti Children's Foundation law which was made in 2012 Act 32 section 2.
translated: In the letter sent to him, this man's action stands against the Ekiti Child Rights Law of 2012, Section 32, Subsection 2.

text: Ame aɖewo tiae be yewoaʋu ayi teƒe bubuwo le susu siwo tae.
ref: Some individuals choose not to migrate to other areas due to personal reasons.
translated: Some people choose to move to other places for various reasons.

text: Asrãdɔlékui sia ate ŋu akaka ɖe amegbetɔwo me to nudzodzoe siwo ŋu dɔlélea le ƒe ɖuɖu me.
ref: The malaria parasite can be spread to humans through bites of infected mosquitoes.
translated: This infectious disease can spread among humans through the consumption of animals that carry the disease.

text: Vevesese sia ate ŋu axɔ miniti alo gaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo hafi wòaɖe eye woate ŋu azã atike aɖewo atsɔ aɖe vevesese sia dzi akpɔtɔ hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe.
ref: This pain may take a few minutes or hours to resolve and some medications can be used to relieve this pain for a while.
translated: This pain may take a few minutes or hours to subside, and certain medications can be used to reduce this pain for a period of time.

text: Ajumako dukɔmeviwo ƒoe ɖe enu be woawɔ dɔ aduadu kple nutoa me dziɖuɖua be woatsɔ atsi aɖitsi ƒe kaka nu.
ref: The people of Ajumako have urged to work together with the local government in order to combat the spread of measles.
translated: The people of Ajumako have urged that they work together with the local government to curb the spread of waterborne diseases.

text: Ehiã be sukudodokpɔkpɔwo nanɔ dzadzraɖoɖi bliboe be woate ŋu asrɔ̃ nu tso sukudɔwɔƒewo ŋu.
ref: School labs need to be fully equipped to handle Chemistry lessons.
translated: It is necessary for school examinations to be fully prepared so that they can learn about school activities.

text: Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe hamemetsiwo nye dukɔa ƒe nuto vovovowo.
ref: Members of parliament represent different regions of the country.
translated: The regional capitals are the different areas of the nation.

text: Nya siawo tsɔa agbemenusɔsrɔ̃ kple nunya veviwo ɖe asi. Ne èhe to na wò gɔme la, èƒoa fu ɖe wò dɔgbo me. Nenema ke nunɔla la nɔa anyi ɖe adzɔge be yeƒe du namu, anye eƒe akpa aɖe.
ref: These sayings carry important life lessons and wisdom. If you punish your bottom, you flatulate in your stomach. Similarly, the priest sits aloof for his town to collapse, he will be part of it.
translated: These words carry life lessons and important wisdom. If you punish your subordinate, you are only hurting yourself. Likewise, the priest sits far away so that his village may be destroyed, as it is a part of him.

text: Ke boŋ ɣeaɖewoɣi la, dɔlélea te ŋu ɖea eɖokui fiana vie alo ɖea dzesiwo fiana be eya hã li.
ref: Instead, sometimes the disease can manifest itself slightly or show symptoms to indicate that it is also present.
translated: Sometimes, the disease can manifest itself slightly or show signs that it is also present.

text: Nuɖaɖavi bubuwo akpe ɖe ŋuwò be woakpɔ nutoa me ta.
ref: Alternative cooking sources help to preserve the environment.
translated: Other cooking enthusiasts will help you explore the area.

text: Wode kpovitɔ aɖe gaxɔ me le esi wòzã adzɔxelawo ƒe ga le mɔ gbegblẽ nu le ɣleti si va yi me. ta.
ref: A certain officer was imprisoned for misusing taxpayers money last month.
translated: A police officer was imprisoned last month for using bribe money in an illegal manner.

text: Fifia, ne ame akpa gãtɔ kpɔ dzesi dzĩ sia la, wokpɔa lɔlɔ̃, ŋusẽ kple ɖekawɔwɔ.
ref: Now, when most people see this red symbol, they see love, strength and togetherness.
translated: Nowadays, when most people see this red sign, they see love, power, and unity.

text: Wo dometɔ aɖewoe nye hadɔwɔlawo ƒe agbanɔamedziwo, gake ne ɖeko wòbia la, dzi dzea eme.
ref: Some raised issues are company obligations but all he's asking for is calmness.
translated: Some of them are colleagues' responsibilities, but when it is just a request, it is acceptable.

text: Menye teƒe ɖe sia ɖe si le dukɔa me lae sɔ be woatu xɔa o.
ref: Not every place in the country is suitable for construction of the borehole.
translated: Not every place in the country is suitable for the building to be constructed.

text: Dzila aɖewo mexɔa wo viwo be woaƒo asa na alakpanyawo atike vɔ̃ɖiwo o.
ref: Some parents didn't take their children for immunization upon rumours of fake drugs.
translated: Some parents do not believe their children to avoid bad drugs.

text: Woɖo aɖaŋu na ɖeviwo be woasrɔ̃ nu tso sukudede ŋu.
ref: Children are advised to be positive about education.
translated: They advised the children to learn about schooling.

text: Tɔdziʋua dze anyi le ta la me eye ame geɖe ku.
ref: The ferry capsized in the lake and killed a number of people.
translated: The boat capsized at sea and many people died.

text: Tsi dzadzɛa akpe ɖe mía ŋu míawɔ avu kple dɔléle siwo tsoa tsi me.
ref: The clean water will help in the fight against waterborne diseases.
translated: Clean water helps us fight against waterborne diseases.

text: Ne amesiwo le liƒoa dzi dometɔ ɖeka ɖee ɖa gɔ̃ hã la, egatsina ake.
ref: Even when one of those sharing the boundary uproots it, it grows again.
translated: Even if only one of those at the border is removed, it will grow back again.

text: Wotsɔa gbemelã saa vɔe eye esia fia Aboakyertɔwo ƒe azãɖuɖu ƒe gɔmedzedze.
ref: The bushbuck is sacrificed and this signifies the start of the Aboakyer festival.
translated: They hunt a bush animal and sacrifice it, and this marks the beginning of the Aboakyere festival.

text: Le nyadzɔdzɔwo me la, nudzɔdzɔ wɔnublanui sia dzɔ le Fianyɔnua ƒe aƒeme. Fianyɔnua ƒe ŋkɔ ŋutɔŋutɔe nye Elizabeth Alexander Mary Windsor.
ref: In the news, this sad incidence occurred at the Queen's house. The Queen''s actual name is Elizabeth Alexander Mary Windsor.
translated: In the news, this sad event happened at the Queen's house. The Queen's real name is Elizabeth Alexander Mary Windsor.

text: Dukplɔla wɔ takpekpe eye wodzro dedienɔnɔnyawo me le Ghana ƒe dɛwo dzi.
ref: The president held a meeting to discuss security lapses on the Ghanaian borders.
translated: The President held a meeting and discussed security issues on Ghana's borders.

text: Abe alesi aƒetɔ tsitsia gblɔ nya sia kple gbe bɔbɔe ene la: geɖe wu na eɖokui wu eƒe zɔhɛ: eye esi wòzi ɖoɖoe ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe le ema megbe la: Oliver bɔbɔ nɔ anyi kpoo.
ref: As the old gentleman said this in a low voice: more to himself than to his companion: and as he remained silent for a short time afterwards: Oliver sat quite still.
translated: Just as the old gentleman said these words in a gentle voice: more to himself than to his companion: and after he had remained silent for a short while after that: Oliver sat down quietly.

text: Nu si wowɔna na vidadaa kple vidzĩa enye be, wonaa gbetike wo be woano ale be vidadaa kple ɖevia nakpɔ lãmesẽ nyui.
ref: What they do for the mother and the baby is that,they give them herbal medicine to drink so that the mother and child will have good health.
translated: What is done for a nursing mother and her baby is that they are given herbal medicine to drink so that the mother and the child will have good health.

text: Ametsitsiwo, dɔnɔwo, kple ame akpe aɖewo abe ŋkuagbãtɔ Akua Mansa kple Akosua Serwaa si xɔ ƒe 90 ene gblɔ be vovo mele yewo ŋu kura ne wole atike dim o
ref: The elderly, the sick, and some thousands like 90-year-old blind Akua Mansa and Akosua Serwaa say they are very busy when it comes to seeking treatment.
translated: The elderly, the sick, and thousands of others like the blind Akua Mansa and 90-year-old Akosua Serwaa say they have no peace of mind at all when looking for medicine.

text: Ne edze ƒoƒo ɖe edzi la, ate ŋu atso amea ƒe nuɖuɖu kple ami ƒe ƒuƒoƒo gbɔ.
ref: When it starts to build up, it may be caused by the person's diet and fat accumulation.
translated: If you overeat, it can lead to the accumulation of food and fat in a person.

text: Le ƒe 1964 me la, Nkrumah yi Dukɔwo Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ðoɖo Ƒe Adre Na Dukɔwo Ƒe Xɔtudɔ Kple Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ me, eye wògblɔ be suku vevitɔ si wɔa dɔ le ŋgɔ tsɔ wɔwɔm la gbɔ eye wòbia be woakeke suku bubuwo ɖe edzi.
ref: In 1964, Nkrumah brought forth the Seven Year Development Plan for National Reconstruction and Development, which identified education as a key source of development and called for the expansion of secondary technical schools.
translated: In 1964, Nkrumah attended the Seven-Year Development Plan for National Reconstruction and Development, and he stated that the primary school that was leading the way was enough and requested that more schools be expanded.

text: Tsãtɔa nyea agbanɔamedzinɔla nenema ke le afisiafi si wotsɔe da ɖe sinimaɖeɖe me - (eɖanye nugbugbɔgbugbɔ, gbɔdɔdɔ, awu ɖeɖe le eƒe awudzraɖoƒe alo nu bubu aɖe si le abe ema ene o.) Ema hã eye wòna wonyae nyuie le sinimawɔƒewo.
ref: The former used to be equally obliging wherever she was placed in filming - (whether kissing, having sex, undressing in her wardrobe or something else like that.) That too and made him well known in the film industry.
translated: The director is the person responsible everywhere they are involved in filmmaking - (whether it is editing, directing, costume design, or anything else like that.) That is also well known in film studios.

text: Nyateƒee, ga nye nusi ame sia ame hiã le eƒe agbe me be wòate ŋu aɖɔ nuwo ɖo.
ref: Of course, money is something that everyone needs in their life in order to make things right.
translated: Truly, money is something that everyone needs in their life to be able to set things right.

text: Ame aɖewo hã yɔnɛ be Tanogbe.
ref: Some also call it the Tano language.
translated: Some people also call it Tanogbe.

text: Agbledela geɖewo adze le wo ɖokuiwo si to ɖeɖefia sia dzi.
ref: More agriculturalists will get exposure through this exhibition.
translated: Many farmers will identify themselves through this revelation.

text: Nuƒoƒo tẽ ƒe habɔbɔ siwo le sukuwo fia nu sukuviwo tso ƒewuiwo ƒe ɣeyiɣia ŋu.
ref: Straight talk clubs in schools have educated students about the adolescent stage.
translated: Clubs for public speaking in schools teach students about the time of youth.

text: Azɔ hã, ne xewo va le nu gblẽm le agblea ŋu to nukuwo ɖeɖe me la, vɔvɔ̃donu aɖe dada ɖe afima ado vɔvɔ̃ na wo.
ref: Also, when birds take to disturbing the farm by uprooting the crops, putting a scarecrow there will scare them away.
translated: Also, if birds come to damage the farm by eating the crops, placing a scarecrow there will frighten them away.

text: Zi geɖe la, amedzro siwo va srãa wo kpɔ la kpɔa dzidzɔ ne woyi teƒe yeyewo hena fefe siwo wowɔna le duta. Ele be bɔlƒoha la natu amedzrodzeƒe siwo ame siwo doa vivi ɖe bɔlƒoƒo ŋu anɔ.
ref: Visiting fans usually have fun when they go to new places for away games. The football club should build hotels where the fans can stay.
translated: Most of the time, visitors who come to see them are happy when they go to new places for games played abroad. The football club must build accommodation for people who are passionate about football.

text: Amesiwo dze egɔme hã doa alɔ ŋgɔyiyi ƒe ɖoɖo siwo wowɔna le woƒe nutoawo me la ƒã.
ref: The initiators also barely support the development programs in their communities.
translated: Even those who have started are supporting the development plans being implemented in their areas.

text: Akɔntabubu le vevie ŋutɔ le dɔwɔƒe.
ref: Accountability is so important in a work place.
translated: Accounting is very important in the workplace.

text: Kpovitɔwo ɖe gbeƒã hã be woaxe fetu si nye GHC2,000.00 na amesiame si ateŋu akpeɖe wo ŋu be woanya susu si tututu ta wòwɔe nenema, si na wolée.
ref: Police have also announced a reward of GHC2,000.00 for anyone who can help them find out the exact reason why he did that, that has caused his arrest.
translated: The police also announced that they will pay a reward of GHC 2,000.00 to anyone who can help them understand the exact motive behind why he did it, which led to his arrest.

text: Aʋawɔwɔ le anyigba ta gakpɔtɔ le amewo dome le kɔƒenutowo me.
ref: There are still land conflicts among people in the rural areas.
translated: War over land still exists among people in the villages.

text: Dziɖuɖua mena ga be woatu mɔ aɖewo le nuto aɖewo me o.
ref: The government does not allocate funds to construct some roads in some areas.
translated: The government did not provide money to build some roads in some areas.

text: Ele be nutome la naxɔ senyalawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe be wòafia mɔ wo le senyawo me.
ref: The district should recruit a legal team to guide them in legal processes.
translated: In his area, he hired a group of lawyers to guide them in legal matters.

text: Le ŋkeke ʋee siwo va yi me la, elektrikŋusẽ do go kuxi siwo wɔe be amesiwo di be yewoaƒle akaɖiwo mete ŋu kpɔ ɖeka o.
ref: In the past few days electricity has been facing problems that have prevented those who want to buy lights from getting one.
translated: In the past few days, electricity power has faced challenges that have made it impossible for those who want to buy bulbs to find any.

text: Enye fefe dodzidzɔname aɖe. Ha siwo wodzina le fefea me la dometɔ aɖewoe nye "Pempenaa, Nanaa!Kpɔ, kpɔ, kpɔ, kpɔ dada koo...". Woƒonɛ zi geɖe le ŋdɔ me.
ref: It is an interesting game. Some of the songs sing during the game is in session is "Pempenaa, Nanaa!See, see, see, see dada koo...". It is mostly played in the afternoon
translated: It is an enjoyable game. Some of the songs they sing during the game are "Pempenaa, Nanaa! Look, look, look, look, mother...". They often play it during the day.

text: Kplɔla siwo tso Nadowli-Kaleo Nutome, Bulisa, Jirapa Dudzikpɔha, kple Talensi Nutome ƒo ƒu lɔ̃ be yewoawɔ dɔ abe ƒuƒoƒo ene.
ref: The leaders from Nadowli-Kaleo District, Bulisa, Jirapa Municipal Assembly, and Talensi District together agreed to work as a team.
translated: Leaders from the Nadowli-Kaleo District, Bulisa, Jirapa Municipal Assembly, and Talensi District have agreed to work together as a group.

text: Coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a gblẽ nu le dukɔ bliboa ŋu vevie eye dukɔ bliboa awɔ aʋa kple coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a le míaƒe dua me.
ref: The whole country is highly affected by the coronavirus pandemic and there will be a national fight against the coronavirus pandemic in our town.
translated: The coronavirus pandemic has severely damaged the entire nation, and the entire nation will fight against the coronavirus pandemic in our country.

text: Ŋutsuawo nedzi hadzidzi, Eye nyɔnuwo nenɔ ɣe ɖum.
ref: Let the men do the singing, and the women do the dancing.
translated: Let the men sing, and let the women dance.

text: Anyigba ŋuti nyaʋiʋliawo na amewo bu amewo ƒe agbe kple nunɔamesiwo le Agona Swedru
ref: The land disputes resulted in loss of lives and properties in Agona Swedru
translated: The land disputes caused people to lose their lives and properties in Agona Swedru

text: Nkyinkyim nye nyakpakpa aɖe si le Fantetɔwo ƒe ŋutinyawo me si le abe nuwɔwɔ si ƒe nɔnɔme le abe zigzag ene. Woxɔe se be ekpɔa teƒe kɔkɔewo ta eye be ekpɔa ame ta le gbɔgbɔ me.
ref: Nkyinkyim is a mythical creature in Fante folklore that takes the form of a twisted, zigzag-shaped creature. It is believed to guard sacred places and is associated with spiritual protection.
translated: Nkyinkyim is a symbol in Fante history that looks like a zigzag pattern. It is believed to represent high places and to provide spiritual protection.

text: Vevienyenye aɖewoe nye, ekpena ɖe mía ŋu míenya alesi xexeame le zɔzɔm, ekpena ɖe mía ŋu míeɖoa dze kple dukɔ vovovowo, enaa míekpɔa dzidzɔ kple bubuawo.
ref: some of the importance are, it helps us to know how the world is moving, it helps us to communicate with different peoples, makes us happy and so on.
translated: Some of the benefits are that it helps us understand how the world is moving, it helps us communicate with different nations, and it brings us joy and respect.

text: Dziɖuɖudɔwɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ gblɔ le kpekpe aɖe si wowɔ tsɔ dzro fetu dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖoa me be yewole te sesĩe.
ref: The Association of Government Workers stated at a meeting held to discuss the salary increment proposal that they firmly stand their ground.
translated: The Civil Servants' Association stated at a meeting held to discuss the proposal for salary cuts that they are standing firm.

text: Nutomea ƒe ŋgɔnɔla xɔ dzɔla yeye ɖe dɔ me le asi me.
ref: The district leader has employed a new watchman in the market.
translated: The regional manager has hired a new cashier.

text: Ele be míana xɔseha siwo le nutoa me nakpɔ gome le sɔhɛwo ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ŋuti nufiafia me.
ref: We should involve the local faith communities to educate the youth about sex education.
translated: We should involve the local churches in the teaching of sexual education to the youth.

text: Azɔ hã, ele tsi ɖevia, dzraa eŋu ɖo eye wònɔa fofoa ƒe ƒometɔwo lalam.
ref: Also, she baths the child, dressed and wait for the family of the father.
translated: Now also, bathe the child, get him ready, and have him wait for his father's relatives.

text: Woadzro dɔléle sia ƒe afɔkuwo me eye woakpɔ egbɔe.
ref: The dangers of this disease will be assessed and remedies will be provided.
translated: They should investigate the dangers of this disease and ensure they are addressed.

text: Nu gbegblẽ wɔwɔ dometɔ ɖekae nye ale si amewo wɔa nu vlo wɔwɔ le míaƒe hatsotsowo me tɔwo nye be womehea nu gbegblẽ vɛ o.
ref: One of the causes of crime in our communities is poor upbringing.
translated: One of the bad things about how people commit evil acts within our groups is that they do not bring about bad consequences.

text: Kɔnu sia bia be woatsɔ anyi dzĩ (Akpade) atre ʋɔtru eve siwo le eƒe axawo dzi le Fiɖa si nye Twins Yam Ŋkekenyui dzi.
ref: This rite involves plastering two side doors with red clay (Akpade) on the Friday of the Twins Yam Festival.
translated: This custom requires that red clay (Akpade) be used to smear the two doors on its sides during Friday, which is the Twins Yam Festival.

text: Nublanuinya aɖe dzɔ ɖe nyɔnu aɖe si xɔ ƒe wuiatɔ̃ (15) dzi le Konongo le Ashanti nutoa me.
ref: A sad thing has happened to a lady of the age fifteen (15) in Konongo in the Ashanti region.
translated: A tragic incident occurred to a fifteen (15) year old girl in Konongo in the Ashanti region.

text: Ele be woanɔ dɔnɔ siwo le nɔnɔme sesẽ aɖe me la ƒe nɔnɔme nyuitɔ me nanɔ nɔvi siwo le kɔdzi.
ref: Patients in a critical state should be given priority in the hospital.
translated: It is important for brothers in hospitals to be in the best possible condition for those who are in a serious state of illness.

text: Katoliko-ha la ana asigɛ nunɔlawo le Ebola dɔvɔ̃a dome.
ref: The catholic church will provide gloves to the priests amidst the Ebola outbreak.
translated: The Catholic Church is helping the people affected by the Ebola epidemic.

text: Ne ƒomea me tɔ bubu yi anyigbaa dzi la, esia ana woanya be ame aɖe va afima xoxo.
ref: When another family member goes to the land, this will communicate to them that someone has already been there.
translated: If another member of the family comes to the land, this will let them know that someone has already arrived there.

text: Ghanatɔ asitsala si xɔ ƒe 43 si le UK, Enerst Kwaku Kobeah, na wonya eƒe tameɖoɖo le NDC ƒe aflaga ƒe hoʋiʋli ŋu.
ref: Ghanaian business man aged 43 who lives in UK, Enerst Kwaku Kobeah, has made his intentions about contesting for the NDC flagbeareship known.
translated: A 43-year-old Ghanaian businessman based in the UK, Ernest Kwaku Kobeah, has made known his intention to contest the NDC flagbearership.

text: Wona tsyɔ̃evi alafa ɖeka blaatɔ̃ susɔeawo le nutoa me, eye woawo hã xɔ sukudɔwɔnuwo kple sukunudidiwo.
ref: One hundred fifty orphans have been given scholarships in the district and they also received scholastic materials and school requirements.
translated: One hundred and twenty-five orphans remain in the area, and they also received school supplies and school fees.

text: Woaɖo ŋku ame siwo le ŋutinya me la dzi le woƒe  akpa si wowɔ na dukɔa ta.
ref: The historicals will be remembered for their contributions towards the country.
translated: We will remember those in history for the part they played for the nation.

text: Ðewohĩ ƒe sia ƒe azãɖuɣi madzɔ dzi na ame abe alesi wònɔna ɖaa ene o elabena wode se ɖe dutoƒo kpekpewo nu
ref: This year's festive season may not be as exciting as usual since public gatherings have been banned
translated: This year's holiday season will not be as joyful for people as it always is because public gatherings have been banned.

text: De ŋugble le nu nyui siwo dzɔ le wò agbe me ŋu, eye nàkpɔ dzidzɔ.
ref: Think a lot about the good things that have happened in your life, and be happy.
translated: Reflect on the good things that have happened in your life, and you will find joy.

text: Ŋutsuwo kple nyɔnuwo kple hadomeŋgɔyiyi ƒe dziɖuɖumegã tsãtɔ bu si na be hadomeɖoɖoa do kpo nu.
ref: The former minister of gender and social development disappeared which made the partnership fail.
translated: The former high-ranking government official for social development and men and women died, which caused the social organization to fail.

text: Ame sia ame, ame tsitsi alo ɖevi ate ŋu aɖu abɔbɔwo.
ref: Snails can be eaten by anyone, adult or child.
translated: Everyone, adult or child, can eat snails.

text: Kpovitɔwo ɖe gbeƒãe le radiodɔwɔƒewo be amewo nade dzesi ame kukua, esi wole numekuku wɔm be yewoakpɔ nyi siwo wofi siwo dziɖuɖua na la.
ref: The police announced on radio stations for people to identify the body, as they carry out investigations to recover the stolen cattle provided by the government.
translated: The police announced on radio stations for people to identify the deceased, as they are investigating to find the cattle that were stolen, which were provided by the government.

text: Wo dometɔ ɖeka ate ŋu awɔ nu vevii eye wòakpɔtɔ anye ame bubuwo tɔ.
ref: One can be disabled and still live a normal life like others.
translated: One of them can do something terrible and still belong to others.

text: Wodzroa dɔwɔla nyui aɖe le ale si wòtea ŋu wɔa dɔe ta.
ref: A good worker is evaluated on the basis of his or her performance.
translated: A good worker is known by how they are able to work.

text: Twigbe gbãtɔ si woŋlɔe nye Akuapem Twi, eye eyae nye gbe gbãtɔ si me woŋlɔ Ŋɔŋlɔ Kɔkɔeawo le Twi me.

ref: Girls who do not attend school at or do not further their education are one of the main causes of teen pregnancy.
translated: Girls who never went to school at all or who dropped out early is one thing that brings poverty very badly.

text: Ɛnyɛ obi na wabɔ ne hokani tuo a, na ɛyɛ obi na ɔde sekan adi ne yere anaa ne kunu awu.
ref: If it is not someone who has shot his/her partner, then it is someone who has stub his wife or her husband to death.
translated: It is not someone who has shot their neighbor with a gun, but someone who has stabbed their wife or husband to death with a knife.

text: Mfuturo binom a εfiri mfididwumabea bi nnwuma mu ba no kita nnuro bi a ano yε den a carcinogen wᴐ mu, na εbεtumi ama onipa bi anya honam ani kisikuro a ano yε den.
ref: some dust that comes from some industries contains some harmful chemicals such as carcinogen, and it can make someone contract skin sore which is very dangerous.
translated: Some byproducts that come from the work of certain chemical industries contain some strong substances that have carcinogens in them, and they can cause a person to get a serious skin cancer.

text: Nhwhwɛmu kyerɛ sɛ saa aduro yin a ɛtaa akomayadeɛ, mogyaborosoɔ, akomayadeɛ, sawa/saa mu yareɛ akyiri no, nanso wɔnya nyɛɛ nhwehwɛmu biara a ɛbɛdi ho adanseɛ.
ref: Research suggests that this yin drug often causes heart attack, high blood pressure, heart attack, sawa/health disease later, but no studies have been done to prove it.

text: Ebia anka nneɛma a wɔrese no sɛ ɔrentumi nyɛ no nyinaa no yɛ deɛ ɔbɛtumi ayɛ ama no aboro so mpo, nanso ɛsiane sɛ akɔba no sei na n'adwene agye atom nti no, daa ɔhunu ne ho sɛ biribiara nni hɔ a ɔbɛtumi ayɛ.
ref: Perhaps all the things he is being told he cannot do would have been even more than he could have done for him, but because it has come to him this way and his mind has accepted it, he always finds himself with nothing he can do.
translated: Perhaps all the things they told him he couldn't do were actually things he could surpass, but because the child had come to believe it, he always found himself feeling like there was nothing he could do.

text: Deɛ nti a ɛte saa ne sɛ, ahokyerɛ a ɛwɔ amansini binom te sɛ Suaman mu no yɛ (6.0%), Wassa Amenfi Atɔeɛ deɛ yɛ (6.9%), ɛnna Aowin nso kura ɛmu (8.9%) pɛ.
ref: the reason is that, the poverty rate in some district like the Suaman district is just 6.0%, Wassa Amenfi West has 6.9%, and Aowin also has 8.9%.
translated: The reason why it is so is that, the poverty rate in some districts like Suaman is (6.0%), Wassa Amenfi West is (6.9%), and Aowin also holds (8.9%) only.

text: Yεatwa nnua akεseε nyinaa ama akwaeε adane mfofoo ne asase pεsεε
ref: Because of deforestation, our forest has become desert and wilderness.
translated: We have cut down all the big trees and the forest has become sparse and bare ground

text: Mmom, ɛhyɛ aseɛ firi Otumfoɔ Ɔsɛe Tutu I so ɛfiri sɛ, ne pɛn so na Ɔkɔmfo Anɔkye yii Sika dwa Kofi maa Asanteman.
ref: It started from Otumfo Osei Tutu 1 , because it was during his era that Okomfo Anokye Commanded the Golden stool
translated: Well, it began from Otumfuo Osee Tutu I because it was during his reign that Okomfo Anokye brought out the Golden Stool for the Ashanti nation.

text: Onipa no brԑ wᴐ adidie ne ᴐnom ho.
ref: The person is tired of eating and drinking.
translated: The person is tired of food and drink.

text: Bio nso, na mmaayewa ne mmeranteɛ nyinaa hwɛ wɔn ho so yie na ama wɔatumi akwati animguaseɛ a ɛte saa ɛno nti, tete no, na mperewanyinsɛn nnɔɔso sɛ ɛnnɛ.
ref: Furthermore, due to the responsible behavior and self-care practices among the young ladies and gentlemen in the towns or villages, the incidence of teenage pregnancy was significantly lower compared to the present times.
translated: However, young women and young men all took good care of themselves and were able to avoid such embarrassment, which is why, in the old days, teenage pregnancy was not as common as it is today.

text: Akanfoɔ amammerɛ mu no, afadeɛ ne ahosiesie yɛ biribi a wɔntoto no ase koraa. wohwɛ mu a, wɔn ahosiesie ka nneɛma ahodoɔ a ɛma wɔda nso firi kasakuo afoforɔ ho no ho.
ref: In Akan culture, festivals and dress are not underestimated. you see, their dress is among the various factors that also distinguish them from other dialects.
translated: In Akan culture, clothing and decoration are something that is taken very seriously. Looking at it, their decoration includes various items that also distinguish them from other ethnic groups.

text: Bɔ mmɔden na taa tenetene w'apom.
ref: Try to exercise regularly.
translated: Work hard and always stretch your limits.

text: Ɛsiane sɛ na Bafo Pem suro sɛ Abonofoɔ yi bɛtumi ayi no ama nti, ɔmaa wɔnomm abosom; ɛne sɛ, wɔtwaa wɔn mogya guu nsuom maa obiara nomm bi.
ref: since Bafo Pem was afraid that the of Bono will be taken off the throne, he gave them gods, that is , they spilled their blood into water to be taken by all.
translated: It was because Bafo Pem was afraid that these Abonofo could remove him, so he made them drink the gods; that is, they cut their blood into the water and made everyone drink some.

text: Wɔn akraboa ne anene (kwaakwaadabi), ne asona wɔ.
ref: Their totem is crow and wild boar.
translated: They have parrots and crows (ravens), and guinea fowls.

text: Adeɛ baako pa ara nti a nnipa yɛ mmɔntohɔ ne osuro anaasɛ ehu.
ref: One of the main reasons people are procrastinated is fear or dread.
translated: The only reason people are cowards is fear or dread.
